tasks.subject: Task 11: Boot the live spine + popover window mechanics
tasks.description:
Boot tokio runtime + coordinator(TauriSink) + watcher, manage handle, register commands, supervise, popover window + tray-click/blur. Files: src-tauri/src/lib.rs, src-tauri/tauri.conf.json, src-tauri/Cargo.toml. Verify: cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && bun run tauri build --no-bundle. Full code in plan Task 11.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src-tauri/src/lib.rs", "src-tauri/tauri.conf.json", "src-tauri/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && bun run tauri build --no-bundle", "acceptanceCriteria": ["coordinator+watcher boot + manage", "commands registered", "supervised", "tray click + blur hide", "borderless always-on-top hidden"]}
```
